title: pogonospermum patulum
intro: Pogonospermum patulum, also known as the Finger Root or Finger Grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Rutaceae and is native to tropical Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Pogonospermum patulum include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. Pogonospermum patulum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
